goals.summary: Local profile: ass-ade doctor does not auto-probe Nexus unless --remote; keys still available for explicit commands.
GitHub workflow runs pip install -e .[dev] then pytest tests/ on guarded path changes.

assAdeEpiphanies: MCP corpus growth implies ass_ade tool registry must stay typed, versioned, and metered—align mcp/server.json changes with Nexus pricing where billable.
Verification literature reinforces rebuild engine + nexus client tests as first-class gates before autopoiesis expands scope.
Next cycle: diff new arXiv IDs against researchRadar.hops.sources; append a fourth hop here when contradictions appear.

Bump nextReviewBy on each suite sync that touches mcp/server.json.
